data.author: Procópio Stein
data.message:
Merge branch 'simple_base_collision' into 'dubnium-devel'

Simple base collision

Change on the collision mesh of the base which simplifies the model of contact with Gazebo ground to a single mesh touching it instead of the 4 casters.

The mesh also includes the orange ring of the base.

With it, we have a new generic gazebo hardware plugin which commands wheels on force which has been proved as working better (no slipping when stopped and so).

See merge request !15

data.author: Jeremie Deray
data.message:
Merge branch 'pmb2_7' into 'cobalt-devel'

Pmb2 7

Update pmb2 urdf so that we have as for now 4 robot models :

- 'default' (no sonar and hokuyo)
- 'sick551' (no sonar and sick tim 551)
- 'sick561' (no sonar and sick tim 561)
- 'sick571' (no sonar and sick tim 571)

Add gazebo plugins draft for sick 561 & 571.
